programmes.show_description: Signed in Blood. Explores how handwriting analysts now play an important role in profiling criminals and verifying the authenticity of suicide notes. S1, Ep13
Trial of the Century. The OJ Simpson murder trial captured the attention of the nation. Find out what forensics could and couldn't tell us about the trial of the century. S1, Ep15
Mansion Murder Cam. In Florida, two loving parents are brutally gunned down. The police must rely on surveillance cameras to catch the killers and bring them to justice. S1, Ep1
The Gold Sedan. CCTV footage and GPS data unlocks the identity of a gunman who shot 27-year-old Reggie Ward in a Cedar Rapids, Iowa, gas station. S10, Ep15

Misplaced Loyalty. Firefighters are called to a home in the middle of the night to find a fire raging out of control but a mystery woman's charred body is discovered. S8, Ep5
Killing Time. From microscopic DNA to ballistics and tiny fibres, find out how cutting edge technology and forensic science is used to bring killers to justice. S8, Ep6
Home Invaders. A convicted bank robber and his partner in crime escape on their way to court and go on to make the biggest bank robbery in Wisconsin history. S5, Ep5
Lawless. When police officers respond to a domestic disturbance, a fleeing suspect fires at them. Fingerprints and an FBI investigation lead to the criminal. S5, Ep7
Hollie Gazzard And Bigamy. Judge Rinder examines the tragic murder of 20-year-old Hollie Gazzard, and a case which triggered an investigation around the globe. S1, Ep6
Masking Evil. A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. The two events lead investigators to a notorious criminal. S3, Ep3

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programmes.show_description: Dark Clouds Lead To A Storm. A young woman is murdered in a bar parking lot. As police retrace her last known steps, several suspects with possible motives come on their radar. S12, Ep4
Gold Pontiac. Amanda Douglas and Jennifer Sudar Sanders are shot dead after a night out. Police examine surveillance footage to track down the callous killer. S7, Ep7
Tracie Andrews & Mike Gifford-Hull. What exposed Tracie Andrews' lie that a road rage attack killed her lover? Mike Gifford-Hull's TV plea for his missing wife Farsi hides the truth. S2, Ep2
Once A Princess. A millionaire doctor and his wife enjoyed a glamorous lifestyle. But, behind closed doors, they were troubled by deceit and violence which eventually turned deadly. S5, Ep1
Brothers In Arms. Two men had been best friends since growing up together in California. What caused their relationship to break down in a devastating and bloody way? S5, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programmes.show_description: Truth Lies And Redemption. In 2011, Detective Christopher Lyons picks up a 25-year-old cold case file, hoping to solve a murder that many see as a tragic miscarriage of justice. S1, Ep4
Cash In Transit And Tye Hawkins. Judge Rinder examines a terrifying armed robbery and the story of 10-year-old Tye Hawkins, who was knocked down by a motorbike rider in a hit and run. S1, Ep7
Gold Pontiac. Amanda Douglas and Jennifer Sudar Sanders are shot dead after a night out. Police examine surveillance footage to track down the callous killer. S7, Ep7
He Haunts Me Everyday. Abbi hopes that fatherhood will change her controlling, abusive boyfriend. When she leaves him, she discovers his jealousy has made him a monster. S9, Ep17
My Brother, The Devil. Wallace believes his brother will guide his family to salvation. But soon, Wallace must choose between loyalty to his family or to his church's new prophet. S2, Ep2
Silent Witness. A respected businessman vanishes after a meeting. At the same time, a young mother doesn't come back from her job search. Can CCTV cameras help to solve the mystery? S1, Ep6
Deadly Target. A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head and the weapon lying nearby. Experts try to determine who fired the gun. S1, Ep16
Fatal Compulsion. Psychologists discuss the behaviour of serial killers, including Ted Bundy, Aileen Wuornos and Canada's Paul Bernardo. S2, Ep1
The Bloody Shoes. After the brutal slaying of a homeless man, James Tony Wise, the Portland PD turns to the footage from surveillance cameras to find his killer. S10, Ep16
One Hour In Omaha. Police retrace a 60-year-old woman's movements after she goes missing in Council Bluffs, Iowa. CCTV footage reveals the lies of someone close to her. S10, Ep17

Silent Killers. A trucker disappears - police search extensively only to find what they feared in their own backyard. And two sudden deaths are not as coincidental as they appear. S8, Ep7
Out to Kill. From personality profiles to DNA testing and fibre analysis, look at how the latest technology in forensic science helps criminologists solve a case. S8, Ep8
The Initiation. When a record store clerk is shot and killed outside a bank, surprising clues left at the scene indicate that robbery was not the motive. S5, Ep10
Domestic Terror. Specialised FBI teams root out and dismantle terrorist operations and put away criminals whose secretive cells are well armed and very dangerous. S5, Ep12
Cash In Transit And Tye Hawkins. Judge Rinder examines a terrifying armed robbery and the story of 10-year-old Tye Hawkins, who was knocked down by a motorbike rider in a hit and run. S1, Ep7
Lie For Me. An air force veteran disappears along with his savings. Detectives discover a woman has been draining his accounts, then uncover a conspiracy of greed and murder. S3, Ep6

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programmes.show_description: FLRT 12. Police wonder if a young woman's personalised license plate, FLRT 12, makes her the target for murder or if a more sinister plot is behind the crime. S12, Ep5
The Three Of Us. A woman vanishes while on a Hawaiian vacation to celebrate her 29th birthday. Police trace her movements to a Waikiki hotel, covered by CCTV cameras. S7, Ep11
Ian Stewart. Bestselling author, Helen Bailey, was a wealthy widow. After finding love again with Ian Stewart she vanished. He helps in the search - but was it a cover-up? S2, Ep6
Body Type. Lindsay and Jason seemed to be on amicable terms after agreeing to divorce. But, a brutal murder suggests there was more to their failing marriage than meets the eye. S5, Ep3
Who Am I? Dianne and Donnie settle down together in a wealthy Chicago suburb. They take the appearance of a power couple, but behind the smiles are horrifying secrets. S5, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programmes.show_description: We Found Bonnie. A family is torn apart when a mother in Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that only the woman's three-year-old son knows the truth. S1, Ep5
Stephen Downing. Judge Rinder examines the case of Stephen Downing, a 17-year-old boy who was convicted in 1974 of the murder of Wendy Sewell. S1, Ep8
Murder At Sunrise. In 2009, Philip Gattuso is murdered in the quiet town of Fargo. When police can't find any leads, they turn to a witness that never sleeps - surveillance video. S3, Ep6
Deadly Ride. In 2022, the execution of a rising cyclist the weekend before a race in Texas sparks a police probe that uncovers jealousy, betrayal, and obsession. S9, Ep10

programmes.show_name: Hollywood Horror Story: People Magazine Investigates
programmes.show_description: When hikers discover the severed head of Hervey Medellin, the cast of suspects includes former lovers, drug cartels and a murderous porn star.
Blood Bath. Mum-of-two Nikki Whitehead is brutally murdered in her own home. Police suspect she may have known her killer. Polygraphs and CCTV footage help reveal the horrific truth. S2, Ep9
